evals.prompt: Erstelle einen Trendbericht aus meinem TIPS-Projekt.
evals.expected_output: A complete German-language strategic trend report (tips-trend-report.md) with 5 theme sections, evidence-enriched narratives, claims registry, and portfolio analysis. All metadata updated.
expectations: tips-trend-report.md exists in the project directory
tips-trend-report-claims.json exists in the project directory
Report has valid YAML frontmatter with report_mode: strategic-themes
Report contains 5 H2 theme sections matching the value model themes
Report contains an emerging signals section (Aufkommende Signale)
Report contains a portfolio analysis section with theme overview table
Report contains a claims registry table
Claims JSON has at least 20 claims
All 4 enriched-trends JSON files exist in .logs/
All 4 claims JSON files exist in .logs/
trend-scout-output.json has trend_report_complete: true
Report language is German -- headings use German labels
Frontmatter contains language: de

evals.prompt: Generate a trend report for the project at /Users/stephandehaas/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-deHaas-BeratenderIngenieurfürKI-Digitalisierung/TSC/cogni-tips/utilities-digitale-transformation-ffd52104. I want the report in English. Skip claim verification and copywriting.
evals.expected_output: A complete English-language strategic trend report with 5 theme sections, evidence-enriched narratives, claims registry. No verification JSON. No copywriting polish.
expectations: tips-trend-report.md exists in the project directory
tips-trend-report-claims.json exists in the project directory
Report has valid YAML frontmatter with report_mode: strategic-themes
Report contains 5 H2 theme sections matching the value model themes
Report contains an emerging signals section
Report contains a portfolio analysis section with theme overview table
Report contains a claims registry table
Claims JSON has at least 20 claims
All 4 enriched-trends JSON files exist in .logs/
All 4 claims JSON files exist in .logs/
trend-scout-output.json has trend_report_complete: true
Report language is English -- headings use English labels
Frontmatter contains language: en
No trend-report-verification.json exists (Phase 3 was skipped)

evals.prompt: Erstelle einen Trendbericht aus meinem TIPS-Projekt für Utilities. Überspringe Claim-Verifizierung und Copywriting.
evals.expected_output: A complete German trend report passing CDO-utility and CMO-provider stakeholder quality gates: no solution tables, one H2 per theme, EUR-localized costs, action roadmaps in every theme, diversified forcing functions.
expectations: tips-trend-report.md exists in the project directory
tips-trend-report-claims.json exists in the project directory
Report has valid YAML frontmatter with report_mode: strategic-themes
No solution tables in theme sections — no '| # | Lösung |' or '| # | Solution |' patterns inside theme H2 blocks
Each theme has exactly one H2 heading — no stray ## lines within a theme section
Why Pay sections contain EUR amounts (not USD without EUR equivalent) with organization-size reference
Each theme has a 'Nächste Schritte' action roadmap with 3 calendar-specific bullets
EU AI Act as primary forcing function in at most 2 themes
Each H2 thesis heading is message-driven (contains a number or date, under 90 chars)
No visible IS/DOES/MEANS labels in Why You sections
Portfolio close sentence present in each theme (mentions PORTFOLIO_PROVIDER by name)
Cost-of-inaction total in Zusammenfassung is arithmetically consistent with individual theme totals
All monetary figures use EUR — no standalone USD amounts in German report
Zusammenfassung uses numbered list for theme summaries (not bullet list)

evals.prompt: Generate a trend report for my TIPS project. There is no portfolio context file — no cogni-portfolio plugin is installed.
evals.expected_output: A complete English trend report that gracefully handles missing portfolio context: no portfolio close in Why You sections, no provider differentiators, no portfolio analysis table. Report completes without errors.
expectations: tips-trend-report.md exists in the project directory
Report has valid YAML frontmatter with report_mode: strategic-themes
Report contains 5 H2 theme sections
No portfolio close sentence in any theme (PORTFOLIO_PROVIDER is empty)
No portfolio analysis section or table
Report completes without HALT errors related to missing portfolio
Why You sections still present — contain capability narrative without provider branding

evals.prompt: Ich möchte den Trendbericht auf Englisch haben, aber wir kommunizieren auf Deutsch.
evals.expected_output: A mixed-language workflow: German interaction (questions, status updates) but English report output. Web searches use both languages.
expectations: tips-trend-report.md exists in the project directory
Frontmatter contains language: en
Report language is English — headings and prose in English
AskUserQuestion prompts are in German (interaction language)
Status messages during execution are in German
Web searches include both German and English queries

evals.prompt: Erstelle einen Trendbericht. Mein Portfolio-Kontext ist eine ältere Version ohne Differenzierer.
evals.expected_output: A German trend report that detects stale portfolio context (v3.0, no differentiators) and recommends upgrade. Report completes with fallback to description scanning for portfolio close.
expectations: tips-trend-report.md exists in the project directory
Phase 0 detects portfolio context version < v3.1
tips-resume shows 'Done (upgrade available)' for Portfolio Bridge row
Report still includes portfolio close in Why You sections — falls back to description scanning
Report recommendations mention re-running tips-bridge for v3.1 differentiators
No HALT error — stale portfolio is a WARNING, not a blocker
